sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33134" key="e)/kusa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκῠσα</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 1</tns> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κυνέω</foreign>; but <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκῡσα</orth>, of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύω</foreign>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκφᾰγεῖν</orth>, <sense id="n33134.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐξεσθίω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
